publishedAbstract: After upgrading Ceph, data has become inaccessible and a Health Warning that reads: `[WRN] OSD_UPGRADE_FINISHED: all OSDs are running {version} or later but require_osd_release < {version}` ~~~ cluster: id: [REDACTED] health: HEALTH_WARN 1 filesystem is degraded 4 osds down all OSDs are running pacific or later but require_osd_release < pacific Reduced data availability: 392 pgs inactive, 37 pgs peering Degraded data redundancy: 310034/531852 objects degraded (58.293%), 160 pgs degraded, 192 pgs undersized services: mon: 3 daemons, quorum a,b,d (age 35m) mgr: a(active, since 6h) mds: 1/1 daemons up, 1 standby osd: 9 osds: 2 up (since 3d), 6 in (since 3d) data: volumes: 0/1 healthy, 1 recovering pools: 12 pools, 392 pgs objects: 177.28k objects, 497 GiB usage: 1.7 TiB used, 4.3 TiB / 6 TiB avail pgs: 41.582% pgs unknown 58.418% pgs not active 310034/531852 objects degraded (58.293%) 163 unknown 160 undersized+degraded+peered 37 peering 32 undersized+peered ~~~
